meta.description: A meeting — agenda, attendees, decisions and actions

sqlSchema:
CREATE TABLE "obj_e5090793_2af7_48e7_b070_abc01fc6af44" (
    item_id UUID NOT NULL,
    "title" TEXT,
    "date" TEXT,
    "duration" TEXT,
    "location" TEXT,
    "attendees" TEXT[] NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}',
    "agenda" TEXT[] NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}',
    "decisions" TEXT[] NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}',
    "recurring" BOOLEAN,
    "notes" TEXT,
    CONSTRAINT "pk_obj_e5090793_2af7_48e7_b070_abc01fc6af44" PRIMARY KEY (item_id),
    CONSTRAINT "fk_e50907932af748e7_item" FOREIGN KEY (item_id) REFERENCES items(id)
)
